MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MUELLER COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. INSUFFICIENT TO RAISE TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THAT PLAINTIFF USED DEFENDANT'S TOOL THAT CONTAINED NO ASBESTOS BUT COULD BE USED ON ASBESTOS CONTAINING PIPE AS WELL AS OTHER PIPES.
